response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the seniority bar for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of fullstack experience including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and relational databases. Berlin-based, matching on-site requirement. Main risk is overqualification and potential salary/engagement mismatch for an entry-level position, but technical fit is strong across required and nice-to-have skills.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across multiple Berlin startups
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) matching the 'clean software architecture' interest
Berlin-based with AI/LLM and Kubernetes exposure covering nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Significantly overqualified for entry/junior level - retention and motivation risk
Resume header says 'Senior Software Developer' while applying for junior/mid role - intent unclear
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed; experience skews toward MongoDB for relational work
